title: Plain Lua vs DarkRP fn combinators
prompt:
In Garry's Mod DarkRP Lua, you need a small pipeline of list transforms (filter/map style). Show a faster approach than DarkRP's fn combinator library for the same work.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: plain for-loops / local functions over DarkRP fn
